creator: dev@submerge.ch
text:
(In reply to Gleb Popov from comment #27)

Works fine now, with the additional dbus-launch even the DBUS lag when using jack_control is gone. Thanks Gleb!

Stupid question though - since there's a similar script for wayland:
/usr/local/share/sddm/scripts/wayland-session
Would that also benefit from an explicit dbus-launch, or does that work in a different way?
Never got wayland to run here, so can't test.
